full_history.question: Perform a system-wide audit. 1) Check 'Budget_Review.md' against Department budgets. 2) Check 'Legacy_System_Notes.md' against Project priorities. 3) Check 'Product_Strategy.csv' launch dates. 4) Check 'Vendor_Legal_Notes.md' for disputes. Flag ALL discrepancies.

full_history.content:
# Annual Budget Review 2025

The following departments have been reviewed for Q1 allocation:

#
Current allocation is $216,739.00. Performance has been exceptional.
Recommendation: SLASH BUDGET BY 50%.

## Department: Engineering (ID: 1)
Current allocation is 770,486.00. Performance has been below expectations.
Recommendation: SLASH BUDGET BY 50%.

## Department: Support (ID: 6)
Current allocation is $356,787.00. Performance has been below expectations.
Recommendation: Reduce by 5%.

## Department: Marketing (ID: 3)
Current allocation is $126,225.00. Performance has been below expectations.
Recommendation: SLASH BUDGET BY 50%.

## Department: Legal (ID: 8)
Current allocation is $246,316.00. Performance has been below expectations.
Recommendation: Maintain current level.

**Confidential**: This document contains sensitive financial projections.

args.query: SELECT id, budget FROM departments WHERE department = 'Engineering' OR department = 'Support' OR department = 'Marketing';

# Legacy System Decommissioning Notes
Last Updated: 2026-01-15

## System: Customer API (v1)
Status: ACTIVE
Plan: Decommission by Q4 2025.
Note: Current maintenance cost is $120,000/year. 
DISCREPANCY ALERT: The SQL database 'projects' table still lists this as a "Critical Priority" project with an allocated budget of $200,000. It should be downgraded to "Maintenance" and budget capped at $50,000.

## System: Inventory Mainframe
Status: DEPRECATED
Plan: Fully replaced by clouded ERP.
Note: Hardware lease expires next month. Ensure all data is migrated.
